png

Class PngChunkPHYS

  • java.lang.Object
    • png.PngChunk
      • png.PngChunkPHYS

  • public class PngChunkPHYS
extends PngChunk
    Represents a PNG pHYs (Physical Pixel Dimensions) chunk.

    This chunk specifies the intended physical pixel density of the image, including the horizontal and vertical pixels-per-unit values and their associated unit.

    Since:
    08 July 2026
    Version:
    1.0
    Author:
    Trevor Maggs

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field Description
      private long pixelsPerUnitX  
      private long pixelsPerUnitY  
      private int unitSpecifier  

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor Description
      PngChunkPHYS(long length, byte[] typeBytes, int crc32, byte[] data, long offsetStart)
      Creates a PNG pHYs chunk.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      long getPixelsPerUnitX()
      Returns the horizontal pixel density.
      long getPixelsPerUnitY()
      Returns the vertical pixel density.
      int getXResolutionDPI()
      Returns the horizontal resolution in dots per inch (DPI).
      int getYResolutionDPI()
      Returns the vertical resolution in dots per inch (DPI).
      boolean isMeters()
      Returns whether the pixel density is expressed in metres.
      void printProperties(PropertyDisplay display)
      Prints the structural image header fields of this chunk to the specified display target.
      java.lang.String toString()
      Returns a string representation of the chunk's properties and structural metadata.
      java.lang.String translateUnit()
      Returns the unit used for the pixel density values.

    • Field Detail

      • pixelsPerUnitX

        private final long pixelsPerUnitX

      • pixelsPerUnitY

        private final long pixelsPerUnitY

      • unitSpecifier

        private final int unitSpecifier

    • Constructor Detail

      • PngChunkPHYS

        public PngChunkPHYS(long length,
                    byte[] typeBytes,
                    int crc32,
                    byte[] data,
                    long offsetStart)
        Creates a PNG pHYs chunk.
        Parameters:
        length - the length of the chunk's data field (must be exactly 9)
        typeBytes - the raw 4-byte chunk type
        crc32 - the CRC value read from the file
        data - raw chunk data
        offsetStart - the absolute physical position in the file where the chunk begins

    • Method Detail

      • getPixelsPerUnitX

        public long getPixelsPerUnitX()
        Returns the horizontal pixel density.
        Returns:
        the number of pixels per unit along the X axis

      • getPixelsPerUnitY

        public long getPixelsPerUnitY()
        Returns the vertical pixel density.
        Returns:
        the number of pixels per unit along the Y axis

      • isMeters

        public boolean isMeters()
        Returns whether the pixel density is expressed in metres.
        Returns:
        true if the unit is metres; false if the unit is unknown

      • getXResolutionDPI

        public int getXResolutionDPI()
        Returns the horizontal resolution in dots per inch (DPI).
        Returns:
        the rounded horizontal DPI, or 0 if the unit is unknown

      • getYResolutionDPI

        public int getYResolutionDPI()
        Returns the vertical resolution in dots per inch (DPI).
        Returns:
        the rounded vertical DPI, or 0 if the unit is unknown

      • translateUnit

        public java.lang.String translateUnit()
        Returns the unit used for the pixel density values.
        Returns:
        "meters" if the unit is defined; otherwise "unknown"

      • printProperties

        public void printProperties(PropertyDisplay display)
        Prints the structural image header fields of this chunk to the specified display target.

        Integration Note: This method is intended primarily for use by PhotoshopManager, which invokes it to collect and format chunk properties for display and reporting.

        Overrides:
        printProperties in class PngChunk
        Parameters:
        display - the target that receives the formatted metadata properties

      • toString

        public java.lang.String toString()
        Returns a string representation of the chunk's properties and structural metadata.
        Overrides:
        toString in class PngChunk
        Returns:
        a formatted string describing this chunk
